# Donkey Code Syndicate LLC

> An independent mobile app development studio by Chris Burns and Shawn Humphrey, based in Arizona, USA. We build privacy-forward, ad-supported apps with more personality than a corporate press release.

## Company

- **Name:** Donkey Code Syndicate LLC
- **Founders:** Chris Burns, Shawn Humphrey
- **Type:** Independent (LLC), two-person studio
- **Location:** Arizona, USA
- **Website:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com
- **Contact:** See the website (contact info intentionally not published in plain text)
- **Platform focus:** Android (iOS expansion in progress)
- **Business model:** Free apps, ad-supported via Google AdMob. No subscriptions. No in-app purchases.

## Apps

### Restful Sounds (Live — Android)

A white noise and ambient sound app for sleep, focus, and relaxation.

- **Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.restfulsounds
- **App page:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/restfulsounds.html
- **Platform:** Android (iOS coming soon)
- **Price:** Free, ad-supported (Google AdMob)
- **Package ID:** com.restfulsounds

**Features:**
- Premium sound library — high-quality white noise and ambient tracks
- Advanced sound mixer — layer and blend multiple tracks with precision volume controls
- Dream journal — capture and organize nighttime insights; supports optional speech-to-text entry via Google Speech Recognition
- Productivity timers — countdown timer and built-in Focus Mode
- Fully customizable — import your own audio files and background images
- Optional Google Drive backup — AES-256-GCM encrypted backup files stored in YOUR Drive; we have zero access to contents
- Privacy-first data model — all user data (journal entries, alarms, settings, presets, custom URIs) stored locally on device; never transmitted to our servers

**Privacy summary (app):**
- We collect nothing directly
- Google AdMob collects: Advertising ID (AAID), device info, IP address, ad interaction data
- Optional Google Drive backup collects: email address for auth, encrypted backup files (app-scope only)
- Optional voice input sends: audio to Google Speech Recognition (transient, not stored by us)
- Full policy: https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/privacy-policy-restful-sounds.html
- Terms of Service: https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/terms-of-service.html

### StoryTime Zen (Coming Soon)

Classic public-domain stories delivered in soothing (and occasionally sarcastic) narrated audio. Designed for bedtime listening and winding down.

## Website

- **URL:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages (static site)
- **Data collected by website:** Currently nothing. Google Analytics planned; will be disclosed via updated privacy policy before implementation.
- **Website privacy policy:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/privacy-policy.html

## Legal

- **Governing law:** Arizona, USA
- **Terms of Service:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/terms-of-service.html
- **Website Privacy Policy:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/privacy-policy.html
- **Restful Sounds App Privacy Policy:** https://donkeycodesyndicate.com/privacy-policy-restful-sounds.html
